briefdescription.para: Write a bare key "key": for nested objects/arrays.
Append a string value to an array.
Append an integer value to an array.
Append an unsigned integer value to an array.
Append a boolean value to an array.
Get the number of bytes written.
Check if the writer is in a valid state (no overflow).
Streaming JSON builder — zero-alloc, caller-provided buffer.

detaileddescription.para: Builds JSON output incrementally into a fixed buffer. Handles auto-commas, nesting, and overflow detection. No parser — this is write-only for building API responses, telemetry payloads, etc.
